title: Harden Captain status projection trust and replay boundary
goal: Define and implement a trust contract for Captain status projections, including trusted source identity, schema/version validation, generated-at/max-age freshness, action or target digest binding, and replay resistance before any future privileged decision can use the projection.

acceptance.assertion: Captain preflight distinguishes trusted projection sources from caller-declared freshness flags.
Projection generated-at and max-age are validated and stale projections fail closed.
Projection schema/version and required fields are validated before use.
Projection evidence is bound to action or target digests and contains replay-resistant metadata such as run id, nonce or receipt reference.

metadata.reason: PR #97 hash-binds projection object but does not establish source trust, max-age semantics, schema trust or anti-replay.
